title: Embedded TM Integration Controls
summary: Replication quality and transport relevance govern planning readiness.
fullContent: Embedded integration reliability is achieved by controlled relevance determination, robust ID mappings, and duplicate-safe inbound processing.
consultantNotes: Maintain integration test scripts across transport cycles
realWorldExamples: Duplicate FO creation eliminated after idempotency key enforcement
interviewQuestions: How do you prevent duplicate processing in TM integration?
